resolved_findings.evidence: Reviewer-owned terminal-loss probe returns BLOCKED/1, complete=false, resend=false, and PROCESS_TERMINAL_MISSING.
Both legacy aliases and missing/zero/negative/bool/string PID inputs return INVALID/UNKNOWN; a positive integer PID completes with count 1.
Each of seven independent replay-control reversals changes strict_replay to false and the matrix cell to UNSUPPORTED.
